title: PackagingProvider
description: An addon to PackagedAuto that backports the ME Packaging Provider.
body: PackagingProvider is an addon to PackagedAuto that backports the ME Packaging Provider, a block added in PackagedAuto for Minecraft 1.18.2+ that combines the functions of a Packager and an Unpackager, whose main purpose is to allow ME systems to skip packaging and unpackaging steps when performing autocrafting. This mod requires MixinBooter.
